name: Chassis
description: Main structural body holding all electronics and motors.

name: Wheel
description: Rubber tire on a plastic rim for locomotion.

name: DC Motor
description: TT gear motor providing drive power to the wheels.

name: Motor Driver
description: H-bridge controller (e.g. L298N) controlling DC motors.

name: Battery
description: Power source, typically 18650 cells or LiPo.

name: Raspberry Pi
description: Main compute unit handling video streaming, networking, and hardware control.

name: Camera Module
description: Captures video for telepresence and vision processing.

name: Pan Servo
description: Micro servo controlling horizontal camera movement.

name: Tilt Servo
description: Micro servo controlling vertical camera movement.

name: Gripper
description: Optional end effector for grabbing objects.

name: Arm Extension
description: Optional linkage to extend gripper reach.

name: Mounting Brackets
description: 3D printed parts holding sensors, servos, and camera.
